lines.speaker: Nurse Wooned
lines.text: Patients, patients everywhere! We need to get these soldiers up and fighting again!

lines.speaker: Nurse Wooned
lines.text: I don't have time to chat, I have patients to attend to.

lines.speaker: Nurse Wooned
lines.text: I can't take much more of this. As soon as we help one patient, another comes in!

lines.speaker: Nurse Wooned
lines.text: I don't have time to chat, I have patients to attend to.

lines.speaker: Nurse Wooned
lines.text: I hope we can stop the lizardmen, I can't take much more of this. As soon as we help one patient, another comes in.

lines.speaker: Nurse Wooned
lines.text: Argh! Where are the bandages? I've got to get on with my job, please leave me be.

lines.speaker: Nurse Wooned
lines.text: Either help out or get out of the way!
